meaning: n.胡言乱语,欺骗,胡说,胡扯,荒唐adj.胡说的,荒唐的vt.欺诈,骗,骗取
examples: I oppose it! Even I think this kind of action is very flimflam!
There is long groan with clutching wrist. Sigh the flimflam . You have become a trousseau!
Merry notes that it is the record, not rhetorical flimflam, that will count when voters assess Obama.
Billie Sol Estes turned himself into a legend as the greatest flimflam artist in Texas history.
That turned out to be flimflam.
